name: kanbantic-claude-plugin
description: Kanbantic issue lifecycle skills: intake (report / request / propose), triage, prepare, execute, review — all artifacts via Kanbantic MCP. v2.2.0 introduces the Prepared status (KBT-F235): kanbantic-issue-prepare now transitions Triaged → Prepared on success, and kanbantic-issue-execute accepts Prepared as the preferred bron-status (Triaged remains supported for legacy issues). See RELEASE_NOTES_v2.2.0.md.
